examples: He was out of work and living in squalor.
It tells the story of an aspiring young man's attempt to rise above the squalor of the street.
We don't want poor people to live in squalor or their children to be malnourished.
The alternative was to live as he did, in middle-class squalor, in married bachelorhood.
Samar's Brahmin pedigree holds him aloof from India's squalor but connects him to nothing else.
